calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2026 Off Calendar

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2026 Continued To Feb-18-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Arthur Kock and Lisa Magruder appeared in person (petitioners).

Ms. Magruder stated that they applied and paid for the license, but they never filed for the license, so it was cancelled. She also stated that they do have pictures of their wedding, that they have video also, that the officiant for their wedding was Hillary Ronen, and that they got married at City Hall in San Francisco.

The Court recommended filing a declaration and attaching copies of the pictures of the wedding ceremony.

The matter is continued to February 18, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Musto. Not reported.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court noted that no appearances were made and that previously raised issues remained unanswered.

There Court ordered the petition off calendar.

Judge: Cindee Mayfield; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2025 Continued To Oct-07-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
